source: AI-Trader Stage 5 backtest. Code of record: working_strategies.py. Evidence: backtest_results.csv. Human-readable spec: agent_strategies_rules.md.
disclaimer: Research tool, not financial advice. Nothing here is approved for live unattended trading. V1 requires a human approval gate.

execution_model.bar_note: Crypto is 24/7; treat one bar as a fixed-UTC 24h candle.
execution_model.signal_timing: Compute from data up to and including the just-closed bar.
execution_model.fill_note: Never act on the bar that produced the signal (no look-ahead). Research engine shifts the position series by 1 bar.

deployment_provenance.validated_on: US equities (SPY, QQQ, AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL), daily bars, 2015-2025
requirements: Re-validate every strategy out-of-sample on the actual target symbol before live size (guardrail #1).
Do not add a short leg that was not validated; approved strategies are long/flat, allocation, or market-neutral.
Lookbacks are in bars, not calendar days; keep them in bars across markets.

global_guardrails: No strategy trades live without an out-of-sample backtest on the target symbol.
Out-of-sample after costs is the bar; in-sample-only performance is ignored as overfit.
Costs and slippage are charged on every test.
V1 human approval gate: the agent proposes {symbol, side, target, size, strategy_id, reason}; a human approves before the order is sent.
Kill switch and risk caps (per-trade max risk, max concurrent positions, daily-loss limit) must exist before live.

status_legend.APPROVED_FOR_PAPER: Cleared backtest; may run in paper/sim behind the human gate. Not auto-live.
status_legend.HOLD: Do not deploy until the listed blocker is resolved.

strategies.name: SMA 50/200 crossover
strategies.notes: Low-turnover trend filter; whipsaws in choppy markets.

strategies.name: LSMA(25) mean-reversion

indicators.definition: OLS line y=a+b*x fit over last 25 closes (x=0..24); value = a + b*24 (regression endpoint).

strategies.notes: Counter-trend; can stay long through a downtrend. Lean on global risk caps/kill switch.

strategies.name: Donchian channel breakout

indicators.formula: max(high, 20) over the previous 20 bars (shift 1, exclude current)
min(low, 10) over the previous 10 bars (shift 1, exclude current)

strategies.position_logic: long on a 20-bar high breakout; exit on a 10-bar low break
strategies.notes: Lowest drawdown of the set. Channel form of the catalog's TP/SL breakout; re-test the TP/SL variant if intrabar fills are available.

strategies.name: QQQ/BND regime allocation
strategies.notes: Highest Sharpe in the set. Re-validate the SMA30 regime and 80/20 split on the chosen crypto pair before use.

strategies.name: KO/PEP z-score pairs
strategies.blocker: Run an ADF / Engle-Granger cointegration test on the spread first. If it is not stationary, discard. Do not trade until this passes.
strategies.notes: Weak edge; nominally beat a cash benchmark only because market-neutral. On hold pending cointegration test.
